hero.description: Many skills add nothing. Some even make Claude worse. Nakiros audits them, runs evals with and without, and tells you which ones to keep, improve, or drop.
hero.installHint: Then type `nakiros` — your browser opens on localhost.

etymology.title: Two words, one purpose.

nakama.meaning: The companion, the teammate, the one who has your back.

kairos.meaning: The Greek god of the right moment. The one who knows when to step in.

etymology.synthesis: Nakiros — the companion that shows up at the right moment. Inside the tool you already use every day, Claude Code.

features.title: Four simple acts, one continuous loop.
features.description: Nakiros doesn't ask you to change how you work. It reads what's already in ~/.claude and helps you make your skills better.

items.title: Scan
items.description: Discover every skill living in your projects and in ~/.claude/skills. See who uses what, how often, and where gaps hide.

items.title: Audit
items.description: Run a structured audit on any skill — trigger description, references, outputs, examples — against a quality checklist.

items.title: Evaluate
items.description: Spin up an isolated copy of a skill and run a suite of evals. Measure what works, what regresses, with real Claude runs.

items.title: Fix & Create
items.description: Tweak a skill in a temp workdir, evaluate the fix against the baseline, then ship once you're sure. Or craft a brand new one from scratch.

steps.title: Install
steps.description: One command. No account, no cloud, no tracking. Nakiros is a daemon that runs on your machine.

steps.title: Open
steps.description: Run `nakiros`. Your browser opens on localhost:4242. The daemon scans your Claude projects and skills.

steps.title: Improve
steps.description: Pick a skill. Audit it. Run evals. Propose a fix. Compare before and after. Ship when you're satisfied — or don't.

openSource.title: Local-first. Open source. Yours.
openSource.description: Your skills and Claude conversations never leave your machine. Nakiros is a plain Node daemon that reads from your disk and serves a local web UI. No telemetry. No sign-up. No lock-in.
bullets: Runs as a local daemon on localhost:4242
No account, no cloud, no data exfiltration
Contribute, fork, or just read the code

cta.title: Try Nakiros right now.
cta.description: No waitlist, no signup. Just install and go.

footer.tagline: The companion that shows up at the right moment.
footer.builtWith: Built for developers who love tools they can trust.
